description: Headless SDK for cmssy. @cmssy/core is framework-agnostic (no React, no Next, no Node built-ins); @cmssy/react, @cmssy/next, @cmssy/astro and @cmssy/remix are adapters.
rules: The framework is an adapter, never the foundation. Data, config and the editor protocol live in @cmssy/core.
@cmssy/next has one entry per runtime: / (anywhere), /server (RSC + route handlers), /middleware (edge), /client (browser).
The editor needs a verified request: cmssyEdit=1 AND a cmssySecret matching the draft secret. A bare cmssyEdit=1 must never open it.
A build cannot tell you whether the editor still works. Run checkCmssyEditMode against a started production build.
